feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP CPI - Global Counter
entry.content:
Hi all,

Hope somebody can help me with this topic:

In SAP Process Orchestration, we can define global counters (number range objects)  in the B2BIC section.

Since we are reusing some of our processes of our PO System in the CPI, I'd like to know how to define such global counters in the SAP CPI environment and how to get access to them in the graphical message mapping?

Thank you,

Eddy

entry.title: Salesforce adapter (1.0.18) returns no result
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have an Integration flow developed on CPI tenant (apache camel version 2.24) which connects to Salesforce application via Salesforce (version 1.0.18) sender adapter. Operation type is SOQL Execute query. When this integration flow is executed, it returns no query result as shown below:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?>
<QueryResult>
<done>true</done>
<totalSize>0</totalSize>
</QueryResult>

I have the same integration flow developed on another CPI trail tenant (apache camel runtime version 3.14) with Salesforce adapter version 1.0.32. When this integration flow is executed, It is returning good number data records from the same salesforce instance (as above).

Can anyone clarify why there is a difference in the behavior and it is expected? 

Regards,

Naresh Dasika

entry.title: Integration Suite Instance Deleted from Trial although Trial Account Validity is there
entry.content:
Hi,

My trial account validity is still there for 51 more days, but I am observing that my integration suite instance has been deleted automatically. As per SAP help, trial account should remain active for 90 dBTP Trial Accountays along with the instances and subscriptions. However, that does not seem to be the case here. Has anyone faced a similar issue? Is there a way to restore the deleted instance?

entry.title: Getting exception while calling the MessageProcessingLogs from CPI
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I was trying to call the Message processing logs from CPI in cloud foundry. But i am getting the below exception 

com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException: An exception of type 'WstxUnexpectedCharException' occurred., cause: com.ctc.wstx.exc.WstxUnexpectedCharException: Unexpected character ';' (code 59) excepted space, or '>' or "/>"

I am using the client id and client secret as basic Authentication. Please suggest me on this.

entry.title: Groovy script udf to handling script length
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have mapping requirement to check for the length of the  string of a array field. If it is a greater than 13, trim it to 13 and if it is empty or less than 13, send as it is.

I tried to write a code as below , it is not working. I'm getting the error.

 

The root message is: Exception:[com.sap.aii.mappingtool.tf7.rt.BehaviorInvocationException: java.lang.ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException: while trying to load from index 1 of an object array with length 1, loaded from local variable 'a'] in class com.sap.aii.mappingtool.tf7.ScriptHandler method StringLen[[Ljava.lang.String;@6a975eaf, com.sap.aii.mappingtool.tf7.rt.ResultListImpl@27bbd186, com.sap.xi.mapping.camel.impl.MappingContextImpl@68693cd6, com.sap.aii.mappingtool.tf7.rt.Context@79fb94ab] on the exchange: Exchange[D10647C5A5BE62C-0000000000000003]

 

 

import com.sap.it.api.mapping.*;
def void StringLen(String[] arg1, Output output, MappingContext context)
{
def str = arg1[0]
for (int i = 0; i < str.length(); i++)
if(str[i].length() >= 13)
{
output.addValue(arg1[i].substring(0,12))
}
else
{
output.addValue(arg1[i])

}
}

entry.title: HTTP Status Code: 501 (Not Implemented)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing the error "HTTP Error 501. The request transfer encoding type is not supported." in HTTP receiver. Same file when chunked is going through, the file size is not very big just 10kb. But it is not going in one go. Any help will be appreciated, thankyou.

entry.title: Request for message processing logs failed with error: {}
entry.content:
In Monitor Message Processing page of the Integration Suite, for all integration flows, no matter if they are successful or not, the following pop-up message occurs:

 
Request for message processing logs failed with error: {}

 

 
Also, I cannot access the logs. This happens both in Cloud Foundry Runtime and Edge Integration Cell runtime

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite; Iterate over Value and write it into other Value in Message Mapping
entry.content:
Hello together,

i have an issue regarding the message mapping.
I want to map every single value of "name" into Produkt1,Produkt2 and so on. 

Is there a way to get the solution through a combination of node functions? I already tried nearly every combination but i didnt get any working solution.

The results from the simulation always are like this but i need different values for every produkt entry.

Thanks in advance. 

Best regards

Filip Agatic

entry.title: capture filename from azure storage adapter
entry.content:
Hi Team,

can anyone throw some thoughts on how to retain the filename coming from AzureStorage sender adapter and send it to S4 (SFTP)

i tried using content modifier and groovy scripts but not able to get the expected result.

Under Exchange properties i am getting as below

 

Lock NameMass_Order_Participant_19gfpaqj9fptegx7vbaacpbh/MassOrderUpload/testtxtfile.txt

i need to capture testtxtfile.txt 

Any thoughts?

entry.title: How to connect with "Microsoft Power Apps" or "Microsoft Dataverse" using "SAP Open Connectors"
entry.content:
Hello
As the title suggests, I would like to know how to connect to "Microsoft Power Apps" or "Microsoft Dataverse" using "SAP Open Connectors", a feature of "SAP Integration Suite".

If you look at the "SAP Open Connectors" catalog, you will see "Microsoft Office 365" and "Microsoft Dynamics 365", etc., but can you connect using these?

As an example of usage...
I want to create something that will allow "SAP Integration Suite" to retrieve the information that is sent when a button in "Microsoft Power Apps" is pressed.

I would appreciate it if anyone with knowledge or experience with implementation could tell me.

Best Regards.
Yuya

entry.title: Using SOAP API of "Create Billing Document- with SD Reference" to post data to S4 HANA cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm using SOAP API of "Create Billing Document- with SD Reference" to create a Billing Document with respect to sales order through a third party App "SOAP UI". 
While sending the request to S4 HANA Cloud ,I'm getting a response as 202:Accepted. But the Billing Document is not being created, I've cross-checked it in the S4 HANA Cloud.
Please help me with this issue as the creation of Billing Document is not being created.

Thanks in Advance,
@Sriprasadsbhat , @Dan_Wroblewski , @Sookriti_Mishra

entry.title: SAP CPI - User Roles for Packages
entry.content:
Hello,

We'd like to grant some external consultants access to our SAP CPI to develope IFLOWS, Mappings, etc.

We created a new package for these development in the Integration Suite where they can do their developments.

My question is:

Is there an option to generate some custom roles for giving access just to this new package so they cannot change any objects in other packages?

Thank you

Eddy

entry.title: IDOC status 02 Error passing data to port with XML HTTP port (SAP Integration Suite)
entry.content:
Hi all.

We have issues when we send many IDOC's in a short time frame (batch program creates +/- 1000 IDOC's in a few seconds) to SAP Integration Suite via XML HTTP port (WE21). My understanding is that this are synchronous http calls. Too many calls will result in IDOC status 02 Error passing data to port.

Is there a way to overcome this issue?
Perhaps setting in WE20 output mode collect IDOC's.

Wilbert

entry.title: XSLT code to call value mapping
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can anyone help me in fulfilling below requirement

my requirement is to call value mapping from XSLT and assign the URL based on input carrierID

example

Input

<CarrierId>12345</CarrierId>

Output

https://www.test.com/track

value mapping is maintained as below

entry.title: CPI: Error message using XML to EDI Converter
entry.content:
Hello all,

This is my first try to use the "XML to EDI Converter" function in an CPI IFLOW. To get the propper XSD file for the X12 message, I've downloaded the XSD file from our former PO system ->B2BIC module.

According to this instruction (https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/define-xml-to-edi-converter) I've named the XSD file in the "XML to EDI converter" to "ASC-X12_855_004010.xsd".

(see attached screen shot)

When I run the IFLow, I'm getting following error message

"com.sap.it.rt.edi.exception.EDIHandlerException: Invalid Payload: XML TO EDI CONVERSION cannot process the payload." 

However I used a payload for the XML message which was working in our old PO system propperly. The payload was added to the CPI IFLow by a content modifier -> body. (see attached screen shot iflow)

Does anyone has an idea how to fix this?

Thank you

Eddy

entry.title: Connect S/4HANA Public Cloud with Integration Suite
entry.content: I have S/4HANA Public Cloud and I want to connect it with the Integration Suite. How can I establish the connection without using SAP cloud connector and Standard Cloud Integration Adapters?

entry.title: while posting data from CPI to S/4 Hana cloud, the data is not being posted.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm using Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous) SOAP API from the SAP BUSINESS ACCELERATOR HUB in CPI to post data from CPI to S/4 HANA Public Cloud. I'm providing all the mandatory fields required in the API and in the response code of the "CamelHttpResponseCode" I'm getting 200.
I've also checked any error in the SOAP Error Log of the S/4 Hana public cloud and couldn't find any error for which it is not being posted.

I'm using "JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest" WSDL in my message mapping as a target but in the response i'm getting "JournalEntryBulkCreateConfirmation". So, I'm unable to identify the issue.

Thanks in Advance,

@Sriprasadsbhat , @Dan_Wroblewski , @Sookriti_Mishra, @JulianoRomanato

entry.title: OdataV2 based API for creating Journal Entry
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm looking for an ODATA based API for creating Journal Entry.
we would like to pass sales order or Billing document  to create this Journal Entry.


Thanks in advance
@Dan_Wroblewski  ,@Sriprasadsbhat, @Sookriti_Mishra , @JulianoRomanato

entry.title: I have a requirement to Sort the data based on the LastModifiedDate field in descending Order
entry.content:
I have a requirement to sort the data based on LastModifiedDate field in descending Order using XSLT mapping in SAP CPI

Could any one please help me to achieve the required output 

Input: 

<root>
<Records>
<State>2</State>
<Version>2.0</Version>
<Requestor>fsiu</Requestor>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T08:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>DEP</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T09:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>DEPL</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-04T07:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>DEPH</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<UniqueName>PR43</UniqueName>
</Records>
<Records>
<State>5</State>
<Version>5.7</Version>
<Requestor>rfs</Requestor>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T08:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>SGD</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T05:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>fsd</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T09:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>TUG</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<UniqueName>PR543</UniqueName>
</Records>
</root>

XSLT Code: 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes"/>
<xsl:mode on-no-match="shallow-copy"/>
<xsl:template match="@* | node()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="Records">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="Approvals">
<xsl:sort select="LastModified" order="descending"/>
</xsl:apply-templates>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

 

Received Output:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<root>
<Records>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T08:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>DEP</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T09:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>DEPL</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-04T07:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>DEPH</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
</Records>
<Records>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T08:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>SGD</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T05:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>fsd</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T09:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>TUG</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
</Records>
</root>

 

Expected Output:

<root>
<Records>
<State>2</State>
<Version>2.0</Version>
<Requestor>fsiu</Requestor>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T09:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>DEP</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T08:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>DEPL</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-04T07:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>DEPH</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<UniqueName>PR43</UniqueName>
</Records>
<Records>
<State>5</State>
<Version>5.7</Version>
<Requestor>rfs</Requestor>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T09:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>SGD</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T08:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>fsd</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<Approvals>
<LastModifiedDate>2024-03-05T05:47:06Z</LastModifiedDate>
<AssignedTo>TUG</AssignedTo>
</Approvals>
<UniqueName>PR543</UniqueName>
</Records>
</root>

entry.title: I've got problems with CPILint , I need HELP !!
entry.content:
Hello Experts , 

I attempted to implement CPILint into my project, but unfortunately, it didn't work. This could be due to my oversight. I hope someone can help me with my problem. Thank you 🙏

 

And this is my log :
